part1.question: Where did you grow up?
part1.followUp: What did you enjoy most about your childhood?

part1.question: How has your neighbourhood changed since you were young?
part1.followUp: Would you like to live in the same area when you are older?

part1.question: Do you enjoy spending time outdoors?
part1.followUp: What outdoor activities do you like?

part1.question: Do you think it is important for children to spend time in nature?
part1.followUp: How can parents encourage children to play outside more?

part2.cueCard: Describe a childhood memory that is important to you.
bulletPoints: how old you were at the time
and explain why this memory is so important to you
followUpQuestions: Why do some childhood memories stay with us forever?
How has childhood changed compared to your parents' generation?
Do you think children today are under too much pressure?
What role do grandparents play in children's lives?
